checks.desc: customer list page includes the specified columns, default filters, and bulk actions
customer detail page exposes the overview block and the required 5 tabs with the defined data and actions
creating a personal customer creates a Customer and, when converted from a lead, inherits Lead.group
search supports name, furigana, phone, and email lookup
related cases expose counts, archived versus active summary, case-name summary, and navigation entry points
one-click case creation and family batch creation launch from the customer page with the customer pre-bound
CustomerRelation records can be created and used as an entry point for related-person batch case creation
visibility and edit permissions follow the administrator, lead, assistant, and sales/front-desk matrix
